description: Example eval structure for new skills

evals.name: basic-functionality
evals.prompt: Test the skill with a basic, straightforward request
evals.expected_output: Skill should handle the request correctly following its defined procedure

evals.name: edge-case-handling
evals.prompt: Test the skill with an edge case or unusual input
evals.expected_output: Skill should handle gracefully without errors

evals.name: format-compliance
evals.prompt: Test that output format matches specification
evals.expected_output: Output should follow the exact format defined in the skill

assertions.name: follows_output_structure
assertions.criteria: Output follows the structure defined in ## Output Format
